name: HL7 FHIR REST API
description: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is a standard for health care data exchange. This API provides RESTful access to healthcare resources including patients, practitioners, observations, medications, and more. FHIR R5 is the fifth release of the FHIR specification.
